title: [December 11, 2025] Proposed Changes to Spark for Upcoming Spell
post1Raw:
## Summary

1. [Ethereum] Spark Treasury - Spark Foundation Grant
2. [Ethereum] SparkLend - Withdraw Reserves (Exec)
3. [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Onboarding with Anchorage (Exec)
4. [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Onboard Spark Prime / Arkis
5. [Ethereum] Spark Savings - Launch Spark Savings spPYUSD
6. [Ethereum] Spark Savings - Update Setter Role to ALM Proxy Freezable for spUSDC, spUSDT, spETH
7. [Avalanche] Spark Savings - Update Setter Role to ALM Proxy Freezable for spUSDC
8. [Ethereum] Spark USDC Morpho Vault - Update Allocator Role to ALM Proxy Freezable
9. [Ethereum] Spark USDS Morpho Vault - Update Allocator Role to ALM Proxy Freezable
10. [Base] Spark USDC Morpho Vault - Update Allocator Role to ALM Proxy Freezable

## Rationale

### [Ethereum] Spark Treasury - Spark Foundation Grants

Phoenix Labs, in its role as a nested contributor, proposes a grant of 1.1M USDS per month from the SubDAO Proxy to the Spark Foundation for a period of three (3) months to cover Q1-2026 Foundation expenses.

Additionally, Phoenix Labs proposes a one time grant of 150,000 USDS to cover expenses for Spark Asset Foundation for Q1 2026.

**Purpose**

The purpose of this grant is to enable the Spark Foundation to fulfill its mandate of promoting the growth and development of Spark, and for Spark Asset Foundation to fulfill its mandate of safeguarding assets deployed via the Spark Liquidity Layer. Grant funds will support essential activities, including but not limited to:

* Engineering and product development
* Community engagement and growth initiatives
* Research and governance contributions
* Infrastructure and operational maintenance
* Administrative operations

**Transfers**

Transfers will be executed via Spark Spells included in Sky Executive Votes, unless otherwise mutually agreed by Sky and Spark. We propose for the first transfers (covering January 2026 for Spark Foundation, and January through March 2026 for Spark Asset Foundation) to be executed as part of the December 11, 2025 spell.

**Parameter Summary**

* Spark Foundation Grant
  * Recipient address: 0x92e4629a4510AF5819d7D1601464C233599fF5ec
  * Transfer amount: 1,100,000 USDS
* Spark Asset Foundation Grant
  * Recipient address: 0xEabCb8C0346Ac072437362f1692706BA5768A911
  * Transfer amount: 150,000 USDS

### [Ethereum] SparkLend - Withdraw Reserves (Exec)

We propose to claim all accrued USDS and DAI reserves from SparkLend. This proposal will move directly to executive vote based on approval in the Spark artifact.

**Parameter Summary:**

* Claim all USDS reserves from SparkLend
* Claim all DAI reserves from SparkLend

### [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Onboard Anchorage for OTC Lending (Exec)

We propose to onboard Anchorage to the Spark Liquidity Layer in order to enable funding of OTC lending / offchain collateralized lending activity. Currently, Spark accesses this opportunity set via Maple. However, we have noted that certain users prefer to borrow directly from the funder with fewer intermediaries, or may have already hit counterparty limits with Maple. Maple also focused solely on short term loans of up to 1 month, leaving an underserved segment of the market for intermediate duration (3-6 month) loans.

Onboarding directly with Anchorage will give Spark an additional way to access offchain borrowing demand and diversify revenue streams, while maintaining acceptable risk profile and transparency via a well defined operational and investment mandate and direct data sharing.

This proposal was approved by governance poll per the [[November 13, 2025] Proposed Changes](https://forum.skyeco.com/t/november-13-2025-proposed-changes-to-spark-for-upcoming-spell/27354) post, and is able to move directly to executive vote.

**Parameter Summary:**

* transferAsset
  * Asset: USDC
  * Address: 0x49506C3Aa028693458d6eE816b2EC28522946872
  * maxAmount: 5 million
  * slope: 50 million

### [Ethereum] Spark Liquidity Layer - Onboard Spark Prime / Arkis

We proposed to onboard Spark Prime, powered by Arkis, into the Spark Liquidity Layer. Initially we plan to set extremely conservative parameters, and will plan to deploy an initial proof of concept tranche of liquidity of up to $20 million. Further deployments will take place next year, dependent on CRR determinations on Spark Prime allocations as well as borrower demand and overall market conditions.

Spark currently has sufficient risk capital on the balance sheet to support the planned $20 million allocation even with a 100% CRR, implying that Sky’s balance sheet bears no direct risk from the planned integration at this stage.

**Parameter Summary:**

* Pool address: 0x38464507E02c983F20428a6E8566693fE9e422a9
  * Asset: USDC
* Deposit
  * maxAmount: 5 million
  * slope: 5 million
* Withdrawal
  * maxAmount: unlimited
* Set maxExchangeRate: 10

### [Ethereum] Spark Savings - Launch Spark Savings spPYUSD

We propose to launch Spark Savings pyUSD to give end users a highly liquid savings vault option to deploy capital. Currently, PayPal pyUSD is primarily driven by incentives on venues including Aave Core or Kamino lend (on Solana). Offering a composable savings vault with native yield may be attractive to certain users, and can also plug in as collateral on external venues like Morpho or Euler. This will also help deepen Spark’s partnership with PayPal.

As part of this product launch, the Spark Artifact should be updated to reflect spPYUSD on Ethereum conforming to the rate, liquidity, and parameter management policies in place for other stablecoins (rate tracking the SSR, and maintaining a 10% target liquidity buffer).

**Parameter Summary:**

* Spark Savings PYUSD (spPYUSD)
  * spPYUSD address: 0x80128DbB9f07b93DDE62A6daeadb69ED14a7D354
  * Roles
    * Default admin: 0x3300f198988e4C9C63F75dF86De36421f06af8c4 (Spark Subdao Proxy)
    * Setter: 0x9Ad87668d49ab69EEa0AF091de970EF52b0D5178 (ALM Proxy Freezable)
    * Taker: 0x1601843c5E9bC251A3272907010AFa41Fa18347E (ALM Proxy)
  * Yield
    * Max yield: 10%
    * Current yield (at launch): 0%
  * Supply cap: 250 million PYUSD
  * SLL rate limits
    * take
      * maxAmount: unlimited
    * transferAssets
      * maxAmount: unlimited

### [Ethereum] Spark Savings - Update Setter Role to ALM Proxy Freezable for spUSDC, spUSDT, spETH

Controller version v1.8 enables the ALM proxy Freezable to perform the setter role for Spark Savings vaults. This is beneficial vs the existing setup where the setter is controlled by the Spark operations multisig, as the ALM proxy has a more robust failover admin control setup including both primary and secondary relayers as well as a freezer multisig. Additionally, managing this under the ALM proxy will allow the primary relayer’s automation features to manage rates programmatically, which will ensure rates immediately track the benchmarks specified in the Spark Artifact without any delays.

**Parameter Summary:**

* Spark Savings spUSDC
  * Update Setter role to: 0x9Ad87668d49ab69EEa0AF091de970EF52b0D5178
* Spark Savings spUSDT
  * Update Setter role to: 0x9Ad87668d49ab69EEa0AF091de970EF52b0D5178
* Spark Savings spETH
  * Update Setter role to: 0x9Ad87668d49ab69EEa0AF091de970EF52b0D5178

### [Avalanche] Spark Savings - Update Setter Role to ALM Proxy Freezable for spUSDC

Similar to above, updating the setter role for Spark Savings on Avalanche will improve robustness of the admin controls while enabling automation.

**Parameter Summary:**

* Spark Savings spUSDC
  * Update Setter role to: 0x45d91340B3B7B96985A72b5c678F7D9e8D664b62

### [Ethereum] Spark USDC Morpho Vault - Update Allocator Role to ALM Proxy Freezable

Controller v1.8 also enables assigning the Morpho vault allocator role to the ALM Proxy Freezable, instead of the current configuration where it is directly held by the relayer safe. Similar to the above explanation, setting the role to ALM proxy improves security as it enables setting a backup relayer and freezer to take over in case the primary relayer malfunctions.

**Parameter Summary:**

* Spark USDC Morpho Vault
  * Set allocator role: 0x9Ad87668d49ab69EEa0AF091de970EF52b0D5178

### [Ethereum] Spark USDS Morpho Vault - Update Allocator Role to ALM Proxy Freezable

Similar to above, we propose to update the vault allocator role from the relayer safe to ALM Proxy Freezable.

**Parameter Summary:**

* Spark USDS Morpho Vault
  * Set allocator role: 0x9Ad87668d49ab69EEa0AF091de970EF52b0D5178

### [Base] Spark USDC Morpho Vault - Update Allocator Role to ALM Proxy Freezable

Similar to above, we propose to update the vault allocator role from the relayer safe to ALM Proxy Freezable.

**Parameter Summary:**

* Spark USDC Morpho Vault (Base)
  * Set allocator role: 0xCBA0C0a2a0B6Bb11233ec4EA85C5bFfea33e724d

**Update (1 December 2025):** Updated addresses for ALM Proxy Freezable for Spark Savings setter and Morpho Vault allocator roles to match deployed contracts. Provided address for spPYUSD vault.

**Update (5 December 2025):** Added addresses for Anchorage, Spark Asset Foundation, and Arkis.
